history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Indonesian man with dark, neatly styled hair and a warm smile is captured in a medium shot, sitting outdoors at night. He's wearing a black t-shirt with the white text "PIXMA" emblazoned on the right chest and blue jeans. His left hand is raised, forming a gesture with his index and pinky fingers extended, while his thumb rests on his middle and ring fingers.

The background is a slightly dilapidated storefront painted a vibrant, somewhat faded green. To the left, a corrugated metal shutter is partially visible, suggesting a shop or stall. Above the shutter and the green wall, a rustic wooden roof structure is supported by visible beams. A simple shelf is mounted on the green wall, holding a few items, including what appears to be a rolled-up blanket or fabric and some other indistinct objects. To the right of the shelf, a blue broom leans against the wall. Further to the right, a large, clear plastic bag filled with snacks or goods is hanging, with red and yellow packaging visible inside. The wall itself has some graffiti or drawings on it, including a poster-like item with the word "MAGNUM" and some numbers.

The lighting is dim and atmospheric, typical of an outdoor evening scene. A strong, slightly cool-toned light source, possibly from a lamp or spotlight, illuminates the man and a portion of the green wall from the left, creating some shadows. The rest of the background recedes into darkness, with hints of foliage in the far right.

The color palette is dominated by the striking green of the wall, contrasted with the dark tones of the man's clothing, hair, and the night sky, as well as the metallic gray of the shutter. The overall mood is casual, relaxed, and slightly moody due to the nighttime setting and the direct, engaging gaze of the subject. The style is realistic, resembling a candid photograph.
